case_title: MIRABBOS MIRAMAD OGLI MAKHMUDOV VS. RAMON NORBERTO GARCIA

REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - RAMON NORBERTO GARCIA;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PER THE AUG-10-17 COURT ORDER PARTIES AGREED TO A FOUR MONTH PAYMENT PLAN. THE DEFENDANT AGREED TO PAY THE PLAINTIFF $300.00 FOR FOUR MONTHS: AUG-14-17, SEP-14-17, OCT-14-17 AND NOV-14-17. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE AND IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF MIRABBOS MAKHMUDOV IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMON GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 11-17-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY MAKHMUDOV, MIRABBOS MIRAMAD OGLI AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RAMON NORBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-17-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIRABBOS MAKHMUDOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMON GARCIA IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO A FOUR MONTH PAYMENT PLAN. THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $300.00 FOR FOUR MONTHS: AUG-14-17, SEP-14-17, OCT-14-17 AND NOV-14-17. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE NEITHER PARTY IS REQUIRED TO APPEAR AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
